## Summary

Closes #42

<!-- What does this PR do? 2-3 sentences. -->
Implemented a RAG chat page UI with sidebar integration and interactive frontend behavior. Added dynamic message rendering, Enter-to-send functionality, and mock AI responses to simulate chat interactions without backend/API wiring.
